meaning: n.百人队长,百夫长(古罗马的军官,指挥百人)
examples: The centurion replied, "Lord, I do not deserve to have you come under my roof."
Not in Italy nor, more specifically, at the Azzurri's training base in Centurion near Pretoria.
The Luxury Institute's recent survey of customer preferences ranked Centurion first and its Platinum card second.
New Zealand won the toss and elected to bat first on a sunny morning in Centurion.
India begin their Champions Trophy campaign on Saturday against Twenty20 champions Pakistan at Centurion.
